summary: Plan is accurate, minimal, and well-targeted. Only one file (renderLoop.ts) needs modification. Existing code analysis matches reality.
strengths: Correctly identifies that bass is passed raw while treble already has EMA smoothing — the gap is real and precisely located
Single-file change scope is ideal: mappings.ts and particleField.ts are already complete
Test-first approach: existing 6-test suite is the contract, implementation just closes the gap
Synthetic bass fallback uses DC offset (30) ensuring immediate non-zero values — critical for T-018-03 where elapsed starts at 0
Risk section is honest and actionable

concerns.description: Plan describes steps 2 and 3 as separate phases but the code changes are interleaved in the same block (compute raw bass → fallback check → smoothing → pass to mapping). The implementation order should be made explicit: (1) raw bass from pipeline, (2) synthetic fallback if < 5, (3) EMA smooth, (4) pass smoothed value.
concerns.suggestion: Clarify in step descriptions that synthetic fallback replaces the raw value *before* EMA smoothing is applied, so the smoother operates on the fallback signal seamlessly.

concerns.description: The else branch (lines 123-127) hardcodes bassEnergy=0 when no signals/seed are available. Plan mentions adding synthetic bass there too, but no test covers this branch (T-018-03 provides seed and signals). Low risk since this is a defensive improvement.
concerns.suggestion: Acceptable as-is. The else branch improvement is good practice but not test-driven. Keep it but note it's untested.

concerns.description: Test defaultParams (bassMotion.test.ts line 36-45) is missing curveSoftness and structureComplexity fields from the VisualParams interface. This is a pre-existing issue unrelated to this plan, and JS runtime handles missing properties gracefully.
concerns.suggestion: No action needed for this ticket. Could be cleaned up separately.

verification_notes.renderLoop.ts_line_96: bass = computeBassAvg(pipeline.frequency) — confirmed raw, no smoothing
verification_notes.renderLoop.ts_line_101: smoothTreble already uses 0.85/0.15 EMA — bass smoothing follows same pattern
verification_notes.renderLoop.ts_line_118: bass passed directly to mapSignalsToVisuals — confirmed this is where smoothBass should replace it
verification_notes.particleField.ts_line_56: bassBoost = 1 + bassEnergy * 2 — confirmed complete, 1x-3x velocity multiplier
verification_notes.particleField.ts_lines_87-94: toroidal wrapping + clamping — confirmed, bounds safety in place
verification_notes.test_T-018-03_timing: Frames at elapsed 0,1000,2000,3000,4000. syntheticBass(0)=30, so bassToMacro(30)≈0.19 > 0. Test will pass.

estimated_complexity: trivial — ~10 lines added to one file
recommendation: Proceed to step 1 (run tests to confirm expected failures), then implement steps 2-3 together since they modify the same code block.
